title: Unidentified Duros (South Apartments)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Unidentified Duros}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Ixgilsfriend.jpg]] |name=Unidentified Duros
(South Apartments) |homeworld=[[Taris/Legends|Taris]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Duros/Legends|Duros]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |skin=Blue |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The Sith are going to execute me for removing the Sith corpse from your apartment complex.|The Duros, to Revan|}} A '''Duros''' lived in the [[South Apartments]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] with his friend [[Ixgil]], both of whom were members of the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that were harassed by [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]] patrols. At one point, Ixgil's friend was arrested by the Sith, and held in the local [[Tarisian military base|Sith base]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was eventually freed by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]. ==Biography== After the [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] carrying [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Carth Onasi]] landed on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], the duo sought refuge in an abandoned [[South Apartments|apartment]] located in the same building in which the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Ixgil]] and his friend of the same [[Species/Legends|species]] lived. After two consecutive [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of harassment from [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]] patrols, Ixgil lost patience, and stood up to one of the patrols, only to be shot and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a [[Unidentified Sith soldier|Sith soldier]]. {{GameLSmechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}} The patrol then engaged in combat with Onasi and Revan, with the same [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] claiming them to be "Republic Fugitives," Ixgil's friend assisted Onasi and Revan in the fight, helping them kill the Sith soldier and his [[Droid/Legends|droid]] associates. After the battle, the Duros thanked Onasi and Revan for the assistance, before removing Ixgil's body, along with the Sith bodies, to protect Revan. However, the Duros was caught by the Sith in doing this and was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] in their [[Tarisian military base|military base]], where Revan later found and freed them, as he and his companions went in search for the Taris Launch Codes. The late Ixgil's friend was unsure why Revan was in the base, but advised Revan that he followed him in escaping from the base. {{Endgame}} ==Behind the scenes== In the game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', when fighting the Sith patrol in the apartment, the Duros cannot be killed by the enemy, but can still be attacked, possibly causing them to clutch their side after the brawl if they is under fire for too long. The Duros may also draw a [[Sword/Legends|sword]] during the fight, though they may also attempt to fight the Sith patrol without a weapon. When the player first talks to the Duros, after defeating the Sith patrol in the apartment, the Duros thanks him for helping, but whilst two of the three subsequent dialogue options do not shift the player's alignment at all, the player could gain [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark-side]] points by threatening to be brutal to the Duros, in which case the fearful Duros tries to explain their words, even though nothing offensive was said. Even if the player does choose to snap, the Duros can't be brought into a fight. When the player reaches this Duros in the Sith base, a small puzzle involving turning a number of panels to the off position must be solved in order to release them, granting the player [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light-side]] points. However, Revan can set all the panels to "terminate," and the Duros will be killed, earning the player dark-side points. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ixgils Freund |pl=Przyjaciel Ixgila }} [[Category:Duros]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Tarisians]]
